schema_version.description: Version of the DITTO schema set this document conforms to

work_item_id.description: Stable identifier for a work item

created_at.description: RFC 3339 / ISO 8601 datetime with timezone offset

updated_at.description: RFC 3339 / ISO 8601 datetime with timezone offset

op.description: What kind of glossary change this entry records

before.description: Prior definition or surface form, if applicable

after.description: New definition or surface form, if applicable

rationale.description: Why the change is needed; cite user statement when available

proposed_by.description: User handle or agent profile that proposed it

agreed_with_user.description: True only after explicit user confirmation; defaults to false on creation

decided_at.description: RFC 3339 / ISO 8601 datetime with timezone offset

items.description: One change to project language as observed during a work item

language-ledger.description: Per-work-item record of language negotiations; merged into glossary once agreed
